rooms.name: 2 Nights Budget Lodge Accommodation
rooms.description: Wake Up to the Wild. Stay Without Breaking the Bank. Experience the magic of the Masai Mara on a budget that works for you. Our 3-day, 2-night lodge package puts you right in the heart of one of Africa's most iconic wildlife destinations — without the luxury price tag. Whether you're a solo adventurer, a couple, or a small group, this package is designed to give you an authentic safari experience with comfortable, clean, and welcoming accommodation as your base. rooms.name: Triple Room Accommodation

rooms.name: Affordable 3-Night Family Accommodation

Sekenani sits right at the Sekenani Gate , one of the busiest and most accessi Book with E Stays.

grand-sunset-phuket.description: Book E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket with E Stays. Experience Luxury and Convenience at E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket Welcome to E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket , a 4-star oasis nestled in the heart of Phuket, Thailand. With its stunning architecture and exceptional service, this hotel offers a truly memorable stay for both leisure and business travelers. Conveniently located just 60 minutes away from the airport, E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket offers a seamless transition from the moment you arrive. Whether you're here for a relaxing vacation or an important business trip, the hotel's prime location ensures easy access to all the attractions and destinations that Phuket has to offer. Step into the elegant lobby and be greeted by the warm and friendly staff, ready to assist you with any request. The hotel boasts a total of 54 well-appointed rooms, each designed with your comfort in mind. With its modern amenities and tasteful decor, you'll find the perfect blend of style and functionality. Check-in begins at 2:00 PM, allowing you to settle in and start your Phuket adventure at your own pace. After a day of exploring the city or attending meetings, you can unwind in the comfort of your room or take advantage of the hotel's facilities. Whether you choose to relax by the pool, indulge in a rejuvenating spa treatment, or savor delicious cuisine at the on-site restaurant, E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket offers a range of amenities to cater to your every need. For families traveling with children, this hotel is a perfect choice. E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket welcomes children between the ages of 5 to 11 to stay free of charge, ensuring a memorable and hassle-free experience for the whole family. With its ideal location, luxurious accommodations, and impeccable service, E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket is the perfect choice for your next visit to Phuket, Thailand. Book your stay today and indulge in a truly unforgettable experience. Unwind and Indulge at E Stays Grand Sunset Phuket 's Vibrant Bar

keraton-jimbaran.description: Book E Stays Keraton Jimbaran with E Stays. Experience Luxury and Tranquility at E Stays Keraton Jimbaran Nestled in the heart of Bali, Indonesia, E Stays Keraton Jimbaran is a 4-star haven that offers a perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and tranquility. With its stunning architecture and lush tropical gardens, this resort provides an idyllic escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Built in 1991 and last renovated in 2009, E Stays Keraton Jimbaran boasts a timeless charm that is complemented by modern amenities. The resort features 102 beautifully appointed rooms, each thoughtfully designed to provide guests with the utmost comfort and relaxation. Whether you choose a spacious Deluxe Room or a private Pool Villa, you can expect a serene atmosphere and breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape. As you step into the resort, you will be greeted by warm and friendly staff who are dedicated to ensuring your stay is nothing short of exceptional. The check-in process begins at 2:00 PM, allowing you to start your vacation without any delay. And when it's time to bid farewell, check-out is until 12:00 PM, giving you ample time to savor your last moments in paradise. Conveniently located just 5 kilometers from the city center, E Stays Keraton Jimbaran offers easy access to Bali's vibrant attractions while providing a peaceful retreat. If you're arriving by air, the resort is a mere 10-minute drive from the airport, saving you valuable travel time. Families are warmly welcomed at E Stays Keraton Jimbaran , as children between the ages of 2 to 5 can stay free of charge. This child-friendly policy allows families to create cherished memories together, surrounded by the resort's serene ambiance and world-class amenities. Whether you're seeking a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a rejuvenating escape, E Stays Keraton Jimbaran is the perfect choice. tri-shawa-resort.description: Book E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort with E Stays. Experience Tranquility at E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort in Prachuap Khiri Khan Nestled in the serene city of Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand, E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort offers a tranquil oasis for travelers seeking a peaceful retreat. This 4-star hotel, built in 2012 and recently renovated in 2021, boasts 27 well-appointed rooms, ensuring a cozy and comfortable stay for its guests. At E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort , check-in begins at 02:00 PM, allowing guests ample time to settle in and start their vacation on a relaxed note. The check-out time is until 12:00 PM, giving visitors a leisurely morning to enjoy their final moments in this idyllic destination. Conveniently located just 6 km away from the city center, E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort provides a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. With its peaceful surroundings and lush greenery, this resort offers a perfect balance of tranquility and accessibility. Unwind and Indulge in E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort 's Entertainment Facilities At E Stays Tri-Shawa Resort , we believe that relaxation and entertainment go hand in hand. Our resort offers a range of entertainment facilities designed to help you unwind and indulge during your stay. From soothing massages to rejuvenating hot tub sessions, we have everything you need to relax and rejuvenate. Step into our tranquil spa and experience the ultimate relaxation with our professional massage therapists. Whether you prefer a deep tissue massage to relieve tension or a soothing aromatherapy massage to unwind, our therapists will ensure you leave feeling refreshed and revitalized. After a day of exploring the beautiful surroundings, take a dip in our hot tub and let the warm water melt away your stress. The hot tub provides the perfect opportunity to relax your muscles and soothe your body. Surrounded by lush greenery, our garden is the ideal spot to unwind and reconnect with nature. berjaya-langkawi-resort.description: Book E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort with E Stays. Experience Luxury and Tranquility at E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort Nestled amidst the lush greenery and pristine beaches of Langkawi, Malaysia, E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort offers a truly enchanting escape. As a 5-star hotel, it promises a luxurious and memorable stay for every guest. With its stunning architecture and world-class amenities, this resort is the perfect choice for those seeking relaxation, adventure, and unparalleled hospitality. E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort is a haven of tranquility, where guests can unwind and rejuvenate in the lap of nature. The hotel boasts a total of 412 elegantly designed rooms, each offering a blend of modern comfort and traditional Malaysian charm. Whether you choose a cozy chalet nestled amidst the rainforest or a spacious suite overlooking the turquoise waters of the Andaman Sea, you can expect nothing but the utmost comfort and serenity. Check-in at E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort begins at 3:00 PM, allowing guests ample time to settle in and explore the resort's myriad of facilities. From the moment you step foot into the lobby, you'll be greeted by warm smiles and a seamless check-in process. The resort's friendly and attentive staff will ensure that your stay is nothing short of extraordinary. Families traveling with children will find E Stays Berjaya Langkawi Resort to be a perfect choice. The hotel's child policy allows children between the ages of 3 to 11 to stay free of charge, making it an ideal destination for a family vacation. The resort also offers a range of activities and amenities specifically designed for children, ensuring that they have a memorable and enjoyable stay. When it's time to bid farewell to this tropical paradise, check-out is until 12:00 PM, giving guests ample time to savor their last moments in this idyllic setting.
